hook.name: PokemonPegHook
hook.description: Pokémon Peg ($pPEG) v4 hoo  k. Mints fragment metadata (one Pokémon per fragment) on every buy and burns LIFO on sell, resolving the tr  ader address from hookData or tx.origin so fragments reach the EOA — not the router. Calls start() on the  token when first liquidity is added, and randomises the seed on each afterSwap. Direct successor to BtcPeg / Upeg  with the same recipient-fix pattern.
